sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over')}")

# Check if the blue blob is still there
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
print(f"\nBlue nodes: {len(blue_nodes)}")
for n in blue_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    center_row = sum(rows) // len(rows)
    center_col = sum(cols) // len(cols)
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, center=({center_row}, {center_col})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
